text.title: ADR AI-Drafted With Review Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: ADR reads like human author; reader cannot tell AI drafted.
AI drafts + commits same hour; decision unreviewed.
antipattern.fix: Block commit until approver timestamp exists.

antipattern.symptom: Context bundle 80k tokens; LLM hallucinates from noise.
antipattern.fix: Pre-build hook truncates bundle to budget.
